description: Style Note This staple cotton t-shirt from jockey is a must have essential that can be worn in any season. The soft fabric gives you a comfortable feel and the vibrant colours are simply enviable. Pair this t-shirt with jeans or shorts and layer under a coat on a windy day Product Details Black t-shirt that has a v-neck, short sleeves, styled to provide maximum comfort and freedom of movement and is designed to be worn as leisure wear, lounge wear or active wear. They are also available in beautiful colours to compliment you Material and CareCotton/Elastane Machine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron
